message: Running Goose: Executing task: Develop Human-Proxy Respondent Module. Description: Construct the human-proxy respon...
objective: Build a Python-based Turing Test Machine. It should have a module for a simulated 'interrogator' and two modules for 'respondents' (one AI, one human-proxy). The machine should evaluate the interrogator's guesses.
history: State: PLANNING - Specification created. Moving to planning...

tasks.title: Develop Interrogator Module
tasks.description: Create the interrogator module to simulate a human interrogator, with a user interface, logic module for decision making, and communication interface.

tasks.title: Develop AI Respondent Module
tasks.description: Implement the AI respondent module, integrating with an NLP model to provide realistic and human-like responses.

tasks.title: Develop Human-Proxy Respondent Module
tasks.description: Construct the human-proxy respondent module, with a database of potential human-like responses and logic for selecting and adapting responses.

tasks.title: Develop Evaluation and Feedback System
tasks.description: Implement a system to assess the accuracy of the interrogator’s guesses and provide feedback on performance, including a scoring system and reporting module.

tasks.title: Prototype Development
tasks.description: Develop and test each module independently to ensure basic functionality before integration.

tasks.title: Integration Testing
tasks.description: Combine all modules and test their interaction capabilities to ensure seamless communication between components.

tasks.title: System Validation
tasks.description: Conduct mock Turing Tests to validate the efficacy of the system in distinguishing between AI and human-proxy respondents.
